sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) prop. retribution, remuneration, reward (see the root in Piel No. 4); hence thanksgiving. זֶבַח שְׁלָמִים a eucharistic sacrifice, offered in giving thanks, Lev 3:1, seqq.; 7:11 , seqq.; Num 7:17, seqq. זֶבַח תֹּודַת שְׁלָמָיו Levit. 7:13 , 15 , a sacrifice offered in praising God and giving thanks. Hence-

(2) such a sacrifice, Amo 5:22 plur. שְׁלָמִים Levit. 7:20 9:4 also in a wider signification used of sacrifices offered in distress, Jud. 20:26 21:4 .
